success.description: True when the daemon finished this transcript successfully (agent loop completed in a good state). False on failure, cap, or invalid result; the host must not treat directives as valid to apply when false.

summary.description: Human-readable text for host UI. When success=true, end-of-loop summary; when success=false, optional error or refusal message (e.g. insufficient context).

uiDisposition.description: Host UI: shown=prominent main panel; skipped=non-actionable/skipped row; hidden=minimal main chrome (mutations may still appear in History when a summary is present); browse=Search/file-list side panel only—do not append this successful completion to main panel History.
